phase: Phase R0-G2 Trusted Twin Court Readiness
notes: Trusted Twin Court artifacts are integrated as readiness documents, an archived trust kernel, and production-safe React readiness components.
No deploy, workflow dispatch, wrangler command, protocol execution, transfer, burn, signing, transaction submission, or Squads multisig mutation was performed.
The offline verifier is a local readiness prototype unless a future reviewed WASM integration is explicitly added.
Local typecheck, build, and tsx-based tests timed out at 300 seconds without emitting source diagnostics in the current runtime environment.
The audit finding is the existing bigint-buffer chain through @sqds/multisig and was not introduced by this Trusted Twin Court readiness patch.
Clean CI gates remain required before any root production deployment.
